THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO CONSIDER DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S REPLY TO NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION AS AN OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF PEDRO MARAVER CABRERA'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF FORD'S PMK. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER FOR HEARING TO OCTOBER 21, 2025. PLAINTIFF MAY SUBMIT A REPLY BRIEF OR TAKE THE MOTION OFF CALENDAR IF IT IS MOOT. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. KEVIN TULLY, ESQ., LAW OFFICE OF KEVIN J. TULLY (650) 377-0708 kevin@tullylaw.net paralegal@tullylaw.net e-service@tullylaw.net Attorney for Defendants FORD MOTOR COMPANY; DGDG 16, LLC, d/b/a CAPITOL FORD
No other appearances

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear. No appearance is made by Plaintiff PEDRO MARAVER CABRERA. Appearance is made by counsel for defendants FORD MOTOR COMPANY; DGDG 16, LLC, d/b/a CAPITOL FORD.

PLAINTIFF PEDRO CABRERA'S Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Document. Court takes the matter off calendar for no appeance by the moving party Pedro Cabrera.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Document
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Continued To Oct-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF PEDRO CABRERA's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant's Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Document.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court exercises its discretion to consider defendant Ford Motor Company's reply to notice of non-opposition as an opposition to plaintiff Pedro Maraver Cabrera's motion to compel the deposition of Ford's PMK. The court continues the matter for hearing to October 21, 2025. Plaintiff may submit a reply brief or take the motion off calendar if it is moot.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
